title: Apply knowledge of automotive electrical circuits and wiring systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply knowledge of automotive electrical circuits and wiring systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
